Product characteristics

01

Patented design

Protected intellectual property developed through rigorous clinical research and engineering validation. US patent active.

02

Clinical precision

Engineered for the specific demands of medical practice. Every dimension, material, and mechanism chosen for performance under clinical conditions.

03

Selective access

Available to qualified practitioners and institutions. Each inquiry is reviewed individually. Access is earned, not assumed.
